criteria.name: Clarity
criteria.description: Prompt is easy to read and unambiguous.

criteria.name: Specificity
criteria.description: Prompt includes concrete instructions, examples, or constraints.

criteria.name: Completeness
criteria.description: Prompt contains all necessary components to generate a good response.

criteria.name: Conciseness
criteria.description: Prompt is brief yet informative, without unnecessary fluff.

criteria.name: Relevance
criteria.description: Prompt is closely aligned to its goal or example references.
